title: Signed/unsigned parameter type improperly passed to module

features.name: type parameter with signed vs unsigned instantiation
features.description: Code should include two instantiations of the same module, one with a signed type parameter and one with an unsigned type parameter

features.name: type parameter as port type
features.description: Code should include a module where a type parameter is used directly as a port type declaration
features.snippet: module cmp #(parameter type element_type = logic)(input element_type a, input element_type b, output logic c); assign c = a < b; endmodule
